name: Picterra
description: Geospatial AI for satellite/aerial imagery with Detector API.

seo.title: Picterra — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Picterra: Geospatial AI for satellite/aerial imagery with Detector API.

when_to_use: Detecting objects in satellite and aerial imagery via API
Training custom geospatial detectors on drone footage
Automating land use classification from remote sensing data
Running change detection between satellite image time series

pros: Geospatial AI tuned for satellite imagery
Detector API for custom object detection
Handles imagery at aerial and satellite scale
cons: Competes with Descartes Labs and Up42
review.verdict: Sharp fit for geospatial analytics teams, irrelevant for anyone not processing satellite or aerial imagery.
review.best_for: GIS and remote-sensing teams detecting objects in imagery
review.not_for: Generic CV workloads on consumer photos or video
